personal.name: Luís Miguel Lopes
personal.title: Data Analyst Coordinator & Full-Stack Developer
personal.description: Experienced Data Analyst Coordinator skilled in transforming complex data into actionable insights and leading cross-functional teams to deliver results. Passionate about building web applications with Laravel and WordPress, while driving strategic initiatives through data analysis and DevOps best practices.

experience.title: Data Analyst Coordinator
experience.description: Leading cross-functional teams to deliver data-driven insights and strategic initiatives.

experience.title: Full-Stack Developer
experience.description: Developing web applications and automation solutions for various clients.

projects.title: Ikabot Dashboard
projects.description: Dockerized empire management dashboard for Ikariam automation — collects real-time empire data and exposes it through a Flask/React interface with monitoring and full bot control.

projects.title: Ikabot (Contributor)
projects.description: Open-source Python bot for automating Ikariam — active contributor to the Ikabot-Collective project. The bot provides a Flask web interface for managing building queues, troop movements, resource distribution, and multi-account operations.

projects.title: Anko Scripts
projects.description: Collection of scripts written in Anko — the scripting language powering the ogame-ninja bot — for automating OGame gameplay. Covers fleet management, resource farming, and recurring in-game tasks.

projects.title: iOS Cloud Backup
projects.description: Shell tool that compresses, splits, and PAR2-protects iPhone backups, then syncs them to any cloud storage provider — Proton Drive, OneDrive, Google Drive, iCloud, Dropbox or NAS.

projects.title: Mac Dev Up
projects.description: One-command macOS developer environment updater. Keeps Homebrew, npm, pip, and system tools current — safe, fast, and idempotent. Designed for daily use without surprises.

projects.title: luismiguelopes.com
projects.description: Personal portfolio built with React 18, TypeScript, Vite and Tailwind CSS v4. Features lazy-loaded sections, Web Vitals reporting, EmailJS contact form, shadcn/ui components and Google Analytics.

contact.title: Let's Work Together
contact.subtitle: Ready to discuss your next project? I'm available for both full-time opportunities and freelance work.
contact.description: I'm always interested in new opportunities and challenging projects. Whether you need automation or web development expertise, let's discuss how I can help bring your ideas to life.
benefits: 8+ years of experience in automation and web development
Proven track record with 20+ successful projects
